name: sandrarodriguezdental
//overrides: Force Next's bundled sharp/postcss to patched versions. Next ships older copies (sharp <0.35.0 / postcss <8.5.10) that npm audit can only 'fix' by downgrading Next to 9.3.3; these are build-time only (static export, images unoptimized) so pinning the patched versions is safe. postcss is scoped under 'next' (nested override) because a root postcss override collides with the direct devDependency (EOVERRIDE), and $postcss=^8 would not bump Next's pinned 8.4.31.
